outputs.description: App name displayed in the Microsoft Entra admin center. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.appId Unique GUID that represents the app ID in the Microsoft Entra ID.
outputs.name: string

outputs.description: List of conditional access policies that the corresponding sign-in activity triggers. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.clientAppUsed Identifies the client used for the sign-in activity. Modern authentication clients include Browser, modern clients. Legacy authentication clients include Exchange ActiveSync, IMAP, MAPI, SMTP, POP, and other clients.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.appliedConditionalAccessPolicies

outputs.description: Reports status of activated conditional access policy. Possible values are success, failure, notApplied, and unknownFutureValue. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.correlationId The request ID sent from the client when the sign-in is initiated. Used to troubleshoot sign-in activity.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.conditionalAccessStatus

outputs.description: Date and time (UTC) the sign-in was initiated. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.deviceDetail Device information from where the sign-in occurred; includes device ID, operating system, and browser.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.createdDateTime

outputs.description: Unique ID representing the sign-in activity. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.ipAddress IP address of the client used to sign in.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.id

outputs.description: Indicates whether a sign-in is interactive. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.location Provides the city, state, and country code where the sign-in originated.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.isInteractive

outputs.description: Name of the resource the user signed into. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.riskDetail The reason behind a specific state of a risky user, sign-in, or a risk event. The value none means that Microsoft Entra risk detection did not flag the user or the sign-in as a risky event so far.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.resourceDisplayName

outputs.description: The list of risk event types associated with the sign-in. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.riskLevelAggregated Aggregated risk level. The value hidden means the user or sign-in wasn't enabled for Microsoft Entra ID Protection.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.riskEventTypes_v2

outputs.description: Risk level during sign-in. The value hidden means the user or sign-in wasn't enabled for Microsoft Entra ID Protection. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.riskState Reports status of the risky user, sign-in, or a risk event.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.riskLevelDuringSignIn

outputs.description: Sign-in status. Includes the error code and description of the error (if a sign-in failure occurs). MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.userDisplayName Display name of the user that initiated the sign-in.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.status

outputs.description: ID of the user that initiated the sign-in. MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.userPrincipalName User principal name of the user that initiated the sign-in. This value is always in lowercase.
outputs.name: MSGraphIdentity.AuditLog.signIns.userId
